direction: Preserve Rider-Waite symbolic structure while creating a fully original Stillpoint Tarot visual language.

brandBrief.rendering: Painterly editorial illustration with clean forms, restrained detail, subtle atmosphere, and believable anatomy.
brandBrief.border: Elegant light border integrated into the card art, subtle linework, premium print-ready feel, no text or numerals.
brandBrief.palette: Soft dawn and dusk tones, weathered neutrals, mineral blues, muted golds, gentle contrast.

globalPromptBullets: Create a single tarot card illustration for Stillpoint Tarot.
Preserve the card's classic Rider-Waite symbolic structure, but do not copy any specific historical artwork exactly.
Keep the composition readable at thumbnail size and graceful at full size.
The mood should feel contemplative and quietly spiritual, not gothic spectacle.
Make the whole image feel like part of one premium, unified 78-card deck.

cards.title: The Fool
mustKeep: youthful traveler on the edge of a cliff
bright open sky and distant mountains
upward or forward gaze suggesting innocent trust
cards.stillpointTwist: Replace the old theatrical wanderer with a quieter, more inward traveler whose courage feels gentle rather than reckless.
cards.paletteHint: Morning light, chalk white, pale gold, wind-washed blue, soft stone.
cards.compositionHint: Clear silhouette, airy top half, sense of poised movement at the threshold.

cards.title: The High Priestess
mustKeep: veil or curtain suggesting hidden knowledge
scroll or book-like symbol of sacred wisdom
cards.stillpointTwist: Emphasize calm inner knowing and sacred quiet over dramatic mystery.
cards.paletteHint: Moonlit ivory, midnight blue, muted silver, soft shadow.
cards.compositionHint: Strong symmetry, gentle depth, veil and pillars framing the figure.

cards.title: Death
mustKeep: mounted rider or ceremonial figure associated with death
figures encountering the passage of death
visual sense of ending becoming transformation
cards.stillpointTwist: Make the card solemn and clarifying rather than horror-driven; the feeling should be release, truth, and transition.
cards.paletteHint: Bone white, dusk black, weathered gold, pale sunrise at the horizon.
cards.compositionHint: Processional movement across the frame with a visible opening of light beyond the ending.

cards.title: Ace of Cups
mustKeep: water and stillness around the offering
cards.stillpointTwist: Lean into grace, tenderness, and emotional spaciousness.
cards.paletteHint: Pearl, mist blue, soft teal, pale gold, luminous white.
cards.compositionHint: Simple centered offering with generous negative space and a sacred hush.

cards.title: Three of Swords
cards.stillpointTwist: Treat heartbreak as lucid grief rather than melodrama; the image should hurt, but it should also breathe.
cards.paletteHint: Storm gray, muted crimson, wet silver, distant light.
cards.compositionHint: Minimal composition, strong negative space, high clarity even at small size.

cards.title: Ten of Pentacles
mustKeep: sense of inheritance, household, and continuity
architecture or setting that implies established life
animals or companions if helpful to the composition
cards.stillpointTwist: Focus on rootedness, belonging, and continuity across generations, not luxury display.
cards.paletteHint: Warm stone, muted ochre, dark olive, faded red, candle gold.
cards.compositionHint: Layered domestic scene with visual stability and quiet abundance.
